sentences.english: Let me walk you through the Q1 customer satisfaction results.
How did we do compared to last quarter?
Our NPS score improved from forty-two to fifty-one which puts us in the excellent category for the first time.
sentences.korean: NPS 점수가 42에서 51로 향상되어 처음으로 우수 등급에 진입했습니다.

sentences.english: Two things — the new live chat support which reduced average response time from four hours to twelve minutes and the simplified return process.
sentences.korean: 두 가지입니다 — 평균 응답 시간을 4시간에서 12분으로 줄인 새 실시간 채팅 지원과 간소화된 반품 절차입니다.

sentences.english: Excellent work. Let's set a target of sixty for Q2.
